contracts.purpose: Candidate schema joining accountable party, sponsor, profile, instance, and model/tool basis.
Candidate schema for a scoped authority envelope constraining an agent action.
Candidate schema for an agent-specific authorization decision trace.
Candidate schema for a concrete deployed software-agent instance.
Candidate schema for model/tool profile used by an agent.
Candidate schema for agent-relevant revocation state.
Candidate schema for the accountable sponsor of an agent action/instance.
Candidate schema for governed software agent profiles.
